setup: CREATE TABLE users (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, email VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
CREATE TABLE orders (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, user_id INT NOT NULL, amount DECIMAL(10,2), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id))

queries.name: select_all_users
queries.sql: SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY id

queries.name: select_user_with_orders
queries.sql: SELECT u.id, u.name, COUNT(o.id) as order_count, SUM(o.amount) as total_amount FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id GROUP BY u.id, u.name ORDER BY u.id

queries.name: select_orders_with_users
queries.sql: SELECT o.id, o.amount, u.name FROM orders o JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id ORDER BY o.id

queries.name: aggregate_total_amount
queries.sql: SELECT SUM(amount) as total_amount FROM orders

queries.name: search_users_by_name
queries.sql: SELECT * FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'A%'
